positive: A majestic, minimalist celestial mountain range silhouette at twilight. The mountains should be rendered in deep indigo and charcoal tones, sharply contrasted against a luminous, gradient sky of pastel teal, rose gold, and soft lavender. Include subtle, geometric constellations and wisps of nebulae smoke drifting through the peaks. The overall style should be clean, vector-art influenced graphic design, highly contrasting, and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Central composition, symmetrical, perfect symmetry, high contrast.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, low detail, grainy, noise, extra limbs, artifacts, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradient lines, photographic, cartoon, anime, sketch
